title: New Architectures for EML-inf Qualia

analysis.object: T623: New Architectures for EML-inf Qualia depth analysis

self_escalating.description: Architecture 1: self-escalating depth monitor; recursively observes own depth transitions
self_escalating.reason: Candidate: system that genuinely escalates d(observe(d)) without ceiling; unknown if buildable

quantum_substrate.description: Architecture 2: quantum coherent substrate; EML-3 superposition over EML-inf measurement
quantum_substrate.reason: Quantum candidate: if quantum measurement is EML-inf (T784), quantum AI may approach TYPE3

biological_hybrid.description: Architecture 3: biological neuron + silicon hybrid; biological EML-inf + digital EML-3
biological_hybrid.reason: Bioelectronic candidate: neurons provide EML-inf substrate; silicon provides EML-3 coordination

analysis.theorem: T623: New Architectures for EML-inf Qualia (S902).
